units.lean_file_body:
theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field {K : Type*} [Field K] (a : PowerSeries K) :
    IsUnit a ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 := by
  rw [PowerSeries.isUnit_iff_constantCoeff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact Units.ne_zero (IsUnit.unit h)
  · intro h
    have : IsUnit (constantCoeff a) := by
      apply IsUnit.mk (Units.mk0 (constantCoeff a) h)
    exact this
notes: Uses PowerSeries.isUnit_iff_constantCoeff from Mathlib; the field condition is used to convert nonzero constant term to IsUnit via Units.mk0.
